key_minus.command: /usr/bin/osascript -e 'tell application "System Events"' -e 'keystroke "/effort"' -e 'delay 0.15' -e 'key code 36' -e 'delay 0.5' -e 'key code 123' -e 'delay 0.15' -e 'key code 36' -e 'end tell'
key_minus.label: minus → /effort, Left, Enter (lower effort, paced)

key_plus.command: /usr/bin/osascript -e 'tell application "System Events"' -e 'keystroke "/effort"' -e 'delay 0.15' -e 'key code 36' -e 'delay 0.5' -e 'key code 124' -e 'delay 0.15' -e 'key code 36' -e 'end tell'
key_plus.label: plus → /effort, Right, Enter (raise effort, paced)

mod10.command: ws=$(herdr workspace list | jq -r '.result.workspaces[]|select(.focused).workspace_id'); id=$(herdr tab list --workspace "$ws" | jq -r '.result.tabs[1].tab_id // empty'); [ -n "$id" ] && herdr tab focus "$id"
mod10.label: track 2 → herdr tab 2
